item.title: What a Twist! ( video )
item.description: What a Twist!

item.title: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied. ( video )
item.description: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied.

item.title: Woman takes the brunt of the impact of this car to save her child. Then another vehicle prevents the driver from escaping. ( video )
item.description: Woman takes the brunt of the impact of this car to save her child. Then another vehicle prevents the driver from escaping.

item.title: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied. ( video )
item.description: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied.

item.title: Woman takes the brunt of the impact of this car to save her child. Then another vehicle prevents the driver from escaping. ( video )

item.title: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied. ( video )
item.description: There are no stupid questions, though. A reporter asked Trump if he would visit the site of the plane crash in Washington. "I have a visit planned, but not to the site. Because tell me, what is the site? The water? Do you want me to go swimming?" he replied.
